summary: Dashboard redesign verified - All features working correctly. Backend API returns category breakdown, NA counts. Frontend displays new layout with Total/Pending at top, small stat blocks, Bill Distribution Status section, Employee+Attendance card, and 3 progress report cards.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/dashboard returns category breakdown (residential: 3460, commercial: 341, vacant_plot: 1268, agriculture: 0, mix_use: 200, industrial: 5)
Backend: GET /api/admin/dashboard returns owner_na (174) and mobile_na (1036) counts
Backend: GET /api/admin/dashboard returns total: 5315, pending: 1891, approved: 3423, employees: 12, colonies: 6
Backend: GET /api/admin/submission-stats returns bill distribution status (total: 3438, pending: 53, approved: 3374, rejected: 0)
Frontend: Total Property (5315) displayed prominently at top - VERIFIED
Frontend: Pending Property (1891) displayed prominently at top - VERIFIED
Frontend: Small stat blocks show: Total Colony (6), Vacant Plot (1268), Residential (3460), Commercial (341), Agriculture (0), Owner NA (174), Mobile NA (1036) - VERIFIED
Frontend: 'Bill Distribution Status' section with Total/Pending/Approved/Rejected Bill Distribution - VERIFIED
Frontend: Employee + Today Attendance card in single row (12 employees, 0/12 attendance) - VERIFIED
Frontend: 3 progress report cards (Town Bill Progress 64%, Survey Progress 65%, Employee Work Progress) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Approved and Rejected stat cards NOT in top row - VERIFIED (only in Bill Distribution section)
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js correctly implements new layout with data-testid attributes for all stat cards
Backend admin_dashboard endpoint uses MongoDB aggregation to efficiently calculate category counts and NA values in a single query
Bill Distribution Status correctly uses submission-stats API endpoint
Progress calculations are correct: Town Bill = (total-pending)/total, Survey = submissions/total
seed_data_creation: None - used existing database with 5315 properties
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard redesign complete and verified. Layout: (1) Top row: Total Property + Pending Property (big cards). (2) Small stat row: Total Colony, Vacant Plot, Residential, Commercial, Agriculture, Owner NA, Mobile NA. (3) Bill Distribution Status section with 4 cards. (4) Employee + Attendance single-row card. (5) Three progress cards (Town Bill, Survey, Employee Work). Approved/Rejected NOT in top row - only in Bill Distribution section. Database: 5315 properties, 12 employees, 6 colonies, 3438 submissions.

approved_rejected_not_in_top.note: Approved and Rejected only appear in Bill Distribution Status section, NOT in top row
